Contributing to LLMR

Source: CONTRIBUTING.md

Thank you for your interest in LLMR.

Reporting bugs

Please open a GitHub issue and include:

  • the provider and model you used
  • a minimal reproducible example
  • the full error message
  • your R version and sessionInfo() output
  • whether the problem occurs with the CRAN release or the development version

Requesting support

Use GitHub issues for questions about installation, configuration, or package behavior. Please include enough detail for the problem to be reproduced.

Suggesting features

Open an issue describing the research use case, the desired behavior, and why the current interface is insufficient.

Pull requests

Please discuss substantial interface or behavior changes in an issue before opening a pull request. Keep pull requests focused. When code changes are proposed, run the test suite and package checks before submitting.

On this page
